mainDescription.title: What is Contractor Management?
mainDescription.description: Contractor management involves the comprehensive administration of independent contractors, including contract drafting, payment processing, compliance monitoring, and documentation management. Our global contractor management solutions ensure seamless, compliant, and efficient contractor relationships across 80+ countries, handling everything from onboarding to payment processing while maintaining full regulatory compliance.

items.question: What is contractor management?
items.answer: Contractor management is the process of onboarding, paying, and ensuring compliance for independent contractors and freelancers. We handle contracts, payments, tax documentation, and compliance so you can scale your contingent workforce without legal or administrative burden.

items.question: How do you handle contractor payments?
items.answer: We process contractor payments in local currencies with automated workflows, clear invoicing, and timely transfers. We handle tax forms (e.g. W-9, 1099 equivalents) and documentation required for compliant contractor relationships.

items.question: Do you ensure contractor compliance?
items.answer: Yes. We help you stay compliant with classification rules, local labor laws, and tax requirements. We monitor compliance changes and support accurate tax reporting and secure documentation for contract-based roles.

items.question: Which countries do you support for contractor management?
items.answer: We support contractor management in 80+ countries, with local expertise to navigate country-specific regulations and payment practices.

items.question: How do you handle contractor classification risk?
items.answer: We help you stay compliant with local classification rules (employee vs. contractor) and provide clear contracts and documentation. This reduces the risk of misclassification and associated penalties.

items.question: Can I use contractors and employees in the same country?
items.answer: Yes. Many clients use both EOR for employees and our contractor management for freelancers in the same country. We can support a mixed workforce with one point of contact.

items.question: What payment cycles do you support for contractors?
items.answer: We support various payment cycles (e.g. monthly, bi-weekly, project-based) depending on your agreement and local norms. Invoicing and payments are processed in line with your contract terms.

items.question: Do you help with contractor onboarding and offboarding?
items.answer: Yes. We handle contract setup, tax forms, and compliance documentation for onboarding. For offboarding, we manage contract closure and final payments in line with local requirements.
